chains.label: Impulse Pressure Chain
chains.description: Repeated impulse choices reduce flexibility later.
chains.triggerNote: Triggered when spending pressure builds for several weeks.

chains.label: Savings Momentum Chain
chains.description: Consistent saving can unlock bonus stability later.
chains.triggerNote: Triggered by strong saving patterns over time.

chains.label: Credit Trust Chain
chains.description: Late or avoided decisions can lower confidence and credit later.
chains.triggerNote: Triggered when protective actions are skipped too often.
